description_long: This is a double-ended open wrench, featuring two U-shaped jaws at either end, each oriented in opposite directions. The body is long and slender, with a consistent width along most of its length, and slightly flared ends where the jaws are located. The surface appears to be made of metal, likely steel, with a dark, matte finish that suggests durability and resistance to corrosion. There are no visible markings, logos, or measurement indicators on the surface. The handle is smooth, lacking any additional grip pattern or ergonomic shaping. Both jaws are fixed and appear to be of different sizes, suitable for turning nuts and bolts of varying diameters.
description: A double-ended open wrench with two U-shaped jaws and a smooth, dark metallic finish. The handle is straight and unadorned, with fixed jaws at each end.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wrench and both open jaws at either end.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting one of the U-shaped jaws and the flat, narrow profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the full length and both jaws, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite jaw, showing the other U-shaped opening and the handle's thickness.
